zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness於1385年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾哈德維其可時，她的父親Simon Barret27歲，母親Mrs Simon Barret27歲。她於1400年與Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton在英國諾福爾可雪登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1456年8月3日在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登享年71歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雪登。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness于1385年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾哈德維其可时，她的父亲Simon Barret27岁，母亲Mrs Simon Barret27岁。她于1400年与Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton在英国諾福爾可雪登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1456年8月3日在英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登享年71岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可雪登。

nameMeanings.name: Barrett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): probably a nickname for a quarrelsome person, from Old French barat, Middle English bar(r)at, bar(r)et(te) ‘trouble, distress’, later ‘deception, fraud; contention, strife’. Through Norman settlement it also became common in Ireland, where it was Gaelicized as Baróid (Munster) and Baréid (Connacht).

variants.name: Barret
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Matthieu, Mirlande, Philippe.

French: derivative of the topographic name   Barre   1 ‘barrier’, or a habitational name from a place called with this word. This surname (in any of the two possible senses; see also 3 below) is also found in Haiti.

variants.name: Baratta
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Pasquale, Alfonse, Antonio, Carmela, Guido, Salvatore, Vincenzo.
Italian: occupational name for a market trader, especially in northern Italy, from baratta ‘exchange, sale, buying and selling’, a derivative of barattare ‘to barter’. See also Barrett .

nameMeanings.name: Catherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness was born in 1385, in Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Simon Barret, was 27 and her mother, Mrs Simon Barret, was 27. She married Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton in 1400, in Shelton, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 3 August 1456, in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71, and was buried in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness est née en 1385, à Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon Barret, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Mrs Simon Barret, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton en 1400, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 3 août 1456, à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Shelton, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness 1385 in Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Simon Barret 27 und ihre Mutter Mrs Simon Barret 27. Sie hat 1400 in Shelton, Norfolk, England Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 3. August 1456 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Shelton, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness è nata il nel 1385 nel Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Simon Barret, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Mrs Simon Barret, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton nel 1400, nel Shelton, Norfolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 agosto 1456, nel Shelton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Shelton, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Barrett Baronessが1385年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアハードウィクで生まれた時，父Simon Barretは27歳，母Mrs Simon Barretは27歳であった。1400年にイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンでSir William Shelton, 18th Lord Sheltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1456年8月3日にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンで71歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクシェルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness(이)가 1385년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 하르드윅에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon Barret(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Simon Barret(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1400년 영국 노르폴크 셸턴에서 Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1456년 8월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셸턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 셸턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness nasceu em 1385, em Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon Barret, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Simon Barret, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton em 1400, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1456, em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness родилась в 1385 г. в местности хардвикк, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Simon Barret было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Simon Barret, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton в 1400 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 3 августа 1456 г. в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности шелтон, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Catherine Barrett Baroness nació en 1385, en Hardwicke, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon Barret, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Mrs Simon Barret, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir William Shelton, 18th Lord Shelton en 1400, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de agosto de 1456, en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Shelton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
